Meaning.En: older in age, especially by a few years
Meaning.Example: She is two years my senior.

Situation.Vi: So sánh tuổi tác giữa hai người, thường trong gia đình hoặc bạn bè.
Situation.En: Comparing ages between two people, especially among siblings or friends.

Meaning.Vi: cao cấp hơn, có thâm niên hơn
Meaning.En: holding a higher rank, position, or level of experience
Meaning.Example: He was promoted to senior engineer after five years.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả người có vị trí cao hơn trong công ty hoặc tổ chức do kinh nghiệm hoặc thâm niên.
Situation.En: Describing someone with a higher position in a company or organization due to experience or seniority.

Meaning.Vi: ở cấp độ cao hơn (trong học đường)
Meaning.En: relating to the final year of secondary school or university
Meaning.Example: As a senior in high school, he applied to colleges last fall.

Situation.Vi: Dùng để chỉ học sinh/sinh viên năm cuối.
Situation.En: Used to refer to a student in their final year of high school or university.
